title: tephrosia berhautiana
intro: Tephrosia berhautiana, also known as the Berhaut tephrosia, is a plant species in the Fabaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Tephrosia berhautiana include its potential to treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and extracts, to harness its medicinal properties.
